items.title: React
items.description: React is a free and open-source front-end JavaScript library that aims to make building user interfaces based on components more "seamless".

items.title: Vue
items.description: Vue.js is an open-source model-view-viewmodel front end JavaScript framework for building user interfaces and single-page applications.

items.title: Svelte
items.description: Svelte is a free and open-source component-based front-end software framework and language created by Rich Harris and maintained by the Svelte core team.

items.title: Astro
items.description: Astro is a JavaScript web framework that renders components on the server and sends lightweight HTML to the browser.

items.title: Tailwind
items.description: Tailwind CSS is an open-source CSS framework.

items.title: Angular
items.description: Angular is a TypeScript-based free and open-source single-page web application framework.
